title: neomezia cubensis subsp. cubensis
intro: Neomezia cubensis subsp. cubensis, also known as Psilocybe cubensis, is a species of psychedelic mushroom that belongs to the genus Psilocybe. It is a fungus that contains psychoactive compounds, including psilocybin and psilocin, which have been used for centuries in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The health benefits of Psilocybe cubensis include reduced symptoms of depression, anxiety, and post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), as well as improved mood and increased feelings of empathy and connection. Herbal preparations of Psilocybe cubensis include dried mushroom extracts, teas, and capsules, which are often used in controlled medical settings or under the guidance of a trained practitioner.
